structure.comments: Well-organized with clear template compliance. Title could be more descriptive than generic 'Short Quiz'. Good mix of multiple choice and short answer questions.

alignment.comments: Excellent alignment with RI.6.1 standard. Questions directly address citing textual evidence and making inferences. Objectives clearly match the standard requirements.

clarity.comments: Instructions are clear and age-appropriate. Questions use accessible vocabulary for grade 6. Some questions could benefit from slightly more specific wording.

difficulty.comments: Appropriate progression from basic concepts to application. Multiple choice questions assess foundational understanding while short answers require deeper thinking suitable for grade 6.

inclusivity.comments: Content maintains neutral worldview and uses inclusive language. Could benefit from more diverse examples or contexts in future iterations.

accuracy.comments: Content is factually correct and pedagogically sound. Answer key provides appropriate explanations. Terminology aligns with grade-level expectations.

issues: Title is too generic - consider 'Text Evidence and Inferences Quiz' or similar
Question 5 could include examples of what makes citations effective beyond just format
Short answer questions could benefit from clearer scoring criteria or sample responses
Consider adding a brief passage excerpt for more authentic assessment context
strengths: Strong alignment with RI.6.1 standard requirements
Clear progression from vocabulary to application
